title: Install Google Analytics and Google Search Console with admin access

requirements.text: Install Google Analytics tracking code in the frontend application with proper initialization in the main entry point or root layout component
acceptanceCriteria: Google Analytics tracking script is loaded in the application
Page views are tracked automatically on route changes
Analytics respects user consent as per DPDP Act 2023 compliance requirements

requirements.text: Add Google Search Console verification meta tag to frontend/index.html to enable console access
acceptanceCriteria: Google Search Console verification meta tag is present in the HTML head section
Verification can be completed through the meta tag method

requirements.text: Create documentation file with instructions for granting Google Analytics dashboard access and Google Search Console permissions to the project owner, including steps to obtain and securely share admin credentials

quotes: Share Analytics dashboard access, grant console permission and admin creds only to me

acceptanceCriteria: Documentation includes step-by-step instructions for adding users to Google Analytics with appropriate role permissions
Documentation includes instructions for granting Search Console property access
Documentation explains how to securely generate and share admin credentials
Documentation specifies that access should be restricted to the project owner only

constraints: Maintain compliance with India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023
Do not modify existing backend authentication or authorization logic
Do not change existing security headers configuration in frontend/public/_headers
nonGoals: Implementing custom analytics tracking beyond standard Google Analytics functionality
Building a custom admin panel for analytics data visualization
Integrating other analytics platforms besides Google Analytics
Modifying existing contact forms or lead tracking beyond adding analytics events
